description: Fix 3 critical issues from semantic review: CLI error handling, NEUTRAL agents framed as bears, and disagreement narrative thresholds
steps: 1. In src/augur/cli.py analyze_cmd non-JSON branch, wrap coordinator.analyze_with_all() and coordinator.get_consensus() in try/except, printing user-friendly error and exiting gracefully.
2. In src/augur/report.py _format_bull_bear_debate, prefer actual BEARISH agents for bear section, fill remaining from NEUTRAL sorted by lowest score, and change label when none are actually BEARISH.

3. In src/augur/report.py _format_disagreement_section, add minimum thresholds: value vs risk needs >=2 value-bulls AND >=1 actual risk-bear; growth vs conservative needs >=2 growth-bulls AND >=1 actual bearish agent.
acceptance_criteria: CLI analyze command catches exceptions and shows 'Analysis failed: {error}' instead of traceback
Bull/bear debate section prefers actual BEARISH agents for bear slots
Bear section label changes to yellow cautious label when no agents are actually BEARISH
Disagreement conditions have proper thresholds preventing false triggers
